title: calanthe gebina
intro: Calanthe gebina, also known as Gebina orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to tropical regions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calanthe gebina include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional remedies such as tinctures and ointments.
